arts.ttl: Phil Jones opens up on abuse he suffered during Man Utd nightmare
arts.sum: Former Manchester United centre back Phil Jones has said he was embarrassed and ashamed to be sidelined so often by injury during his final four years at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal and Aston Villa could rival Liverpool for £50m midfielder
arts.sum: Liverpool could face competition from five other Premier League clubs for the signature of Brazilian midfielder Ederson, according to reports. The Reds have been heavily linked with Ederson in recent months but failed to sign a defensive midfielder over the summer, also missing out on Spain international Martin Zubimendi. Liverpool’s failure to strengthen through the […] The post Report: Arsenal and Aston Villa could rival Liverpool for £50m midfielder appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery reveals how much he demands from Aston Villa stars: 'It will be worth it'
arts.sum: Aston Villa, buoyed by their Champions League win over Bayern Munich at Villa Park in midweek, play host to Manchester United and under-fire Erik ten Hag in the Premier League on Sunday

arts.ttl: Man Utd confirm deal for highly-rated youngster after Arsenal exit
arts.sum: United's academy director Nick Cox said : "We welcome Samuel Lusale, Chido Obi-Martin and James Overy to the club. United have now confirmed the teenager has been added to the club's group of first-year scholars alongside winger Samuel Lusale and right-back James Overy, both 17, who signed from Perth Glory and Crystal Palace respectively.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes sends defiant message to Man Utd fans after consecutive red cards
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes has thanked Manchester United fans for their support in what he described as "one of the hardest" moments of his career following two red cards in consecutive games. He wrote: "Tough moment as a team and personally for me, one of the hardest.

arts.ttl: Maguire: Man Utd players to blame, not Ten Hag
arts.sum: Manchester United's players must take responsibility for their run of poor form instead of blaming manager Erik ten Hag, according to Harry Maguire.

arts.ttl: Everyone piles on – Harry Maguire calls for Man Utd to stick together
arts.sum: Defeat to Tottenham was compounded as United blew a two-goal Europa League lead against Porto.

arts.ttl: 'We're playing better than last season' - What Manchester United dressing room thinks of their form
arts.sum: Harry Maguire salvaged a draw for Man United against Porto in midweek and could start at Aston Villa on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Harry Maguire gives brutally honest response after being left out of England squad
arts.sum: Manchester United defender Harry Maguire has opened up on his feelings after being omitted from the England squad to face Greece and Finland in the international break

arts.ttl: Papers: Van Nistelrooy to be offered interim Man Utd job if Ten Hag sacked
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Sunday's newspapers...
